name: Poly Party
short_description: Welcome to Poly Party! A combination of Action, Adventure, Strategy, RPG, and Racing. Play some boardgames, minigames, missions, and races in the game modes provided!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Poly Party! A game of games, and a lot to do! Play some board games and minigames in Party Mode. Roam and explore cities where you can buy, obtain, upgrade and customize cars, as well as work odd jobs, participate in missions, race, play arcade games, and more in Poly Mode. Race your cars in Racer Nation, where you can race in circuits, time trials, and events with various rewards!

A lot to do and a lot to explore!

Update:
-the game has been updated to the PlayStation port! Due to crash issues with the PC version, and lost code, this was the best solution. This means that the recommended gamepad to use while playing would be a PlayStation controller. Other gamepads will work, but the control displays are shown in PlayStation terminology. Please keep this in mind if you intend to buy this title.
